title: knautia arvensis subsp. sylvatica
intro: Knautia arvensis subsp. sylvatica, also known as woodland spotted knawel, is a plant species in the family Dipsacaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis subsp. sylvatica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
